mapper.insert: insert into lyh_favorite (user_id, biz_type, target_id, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{bizType}, #{targetId}, now())
mapper.delete: delete from lyh_favorite where user_id = #{userId} and biz_type = #{bizType} and target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: select target_id from lyh_favorite where user_id = #{userId} and biz_type = #{bizType} order by favorite_id desc
